description: Fix all unhandled checked exception compilation errors in the 'DataProcessor' Java project located at `~/eclipse-workspace/DataProcessor` to ensure the project compiles with zero errors. Implement proper exception handling in the source files within `src/com/dataprocessor/` by using try-with-resources for file I/O in `FileProcessor.java` and `ConfigParser.java`, and applying exception chaining (wrapping caught exceptions like `ClassNotFoundException`, `SQLException`, `IOException`, and `ParseException` into a `ProcessingException`) in `DatabaseConnector.java` and `ConfigParser.java`. The `App.java` main method must include a top-level try-catch block to handle `ProcessingException` and print the stack trace. Ensure there are no empty catch blocks and that exception chaining is used in at least two files.
